items.docs: Returns base64 encoded image, status and messages (if any validation failures) related to the logo of a sub-merchant.

info.name: Mastercard Create a Logo for an Existing Merchant.

items.docs: Returns status and messages (if any validation failures) related to the logo of a sub-merchant.

info.name: Mastercard Update a Logo for an Existing Merchant.

items.docs: Returns status and messages (if any validation failures) related to the logo of a sub-merchant.

info.name: Mastercard Delete a Logo for an Existing Merchant.

items.docs: Returns 204 status code if logo deleted successfully.

info.name: Mastercard Get Sub-merchant by Guid.

items.docs: Returns sub-merchant object with status.

info.name: Mastercard Update a Sub-merchant.

items.docs: Returns sub-merchant object with status.

info.name: Mastercard Activate/deactivate a Sub-merchant.

items.docs:
Returns 204 if merchant is activated/deactivated successfully. It takes a state attribute with two possible values:

  - INACTIVE
    - For LIVE and LOCKED_FOR_EDIT merchants, this endpoint changes the merchant to INACTIVE status.
    - For CONFIGURATION merchants, it physically deletes the merchant, rather than deactivating it.

  - ACTIVE
    - Reactivates an INACTIVE merchant by placing it in CONFIGURATION status. From there, the flow follows the onboarding process where the merchant is in CO

info.name: Mastercard Get Sub-merchant's Locations

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip before starting to collect the result set

params.name: sort_direction
params.description: Direction to sort the data using sort_field in response

params.description: Field to Sort data in response

params.name: search_text
params.description: Input field used as wild search in region/city/country like regex %search_text%

items.docs: Returns sub-merchant's locations with pagination metadata

info.name: Mastercard Add a Unique Set of Sub-merchant's Locations

items.docs: Creates locations under an existing sub-merchant

items.docs: Updates a location object

info.name: Mastercard Delete an Existing Location

items.docs: Returns 204 status code if Location deleted successfully

params.description: BIN that a partner currently services under their portfolio.

items.docs: Get the acquirer reference id configs filtered by acquirer reference id and card scheme.

info.name: Card
Mastercard Get Sub-merchant Card Acceptor Id Configs.

params.name: member_id
params.description: Merchant member ID (parent of the sub-merchant)

params.name: acquirer_reference_id
params.description: BIN that a partner currently services under their portfolio.

params.name: card_acceptor_id
params.description: Identifies the card acceptor ID assigned by the acquirer. This ID must represent a unique identifier for each merchant name/location within the acquirer BIN.

items.docs: Returns sub-merchant card acceptor id config details.

info.name: Mastercard Create Sub-merchant Card Acceptor Id Config.

params.name: member_id
params.description: Merchant member ID (parent of the sub-merchant)

items.docs: Returns created sub-merchant card acceptor id config details.

info.name: Mastercard Delete Sub-merchant Card Acceptor Id Config.

params.name: member_id
params.description: Merchant member ID (parent of the sub-merchant)

params.name: merchant_identifier_config_id
params.description: The Configuration ID for acquirer reference ID or card acceptor ID or card acceptor name configurations.

items.docs: Returns 200 if sub-merchant card acceptor id configs gets deleted.

params.name: merchant_identifier_config_id

items.docs: Returns 200 if sub-merchant card acceptor name configs gets deleted.

info.name: Mastercard Get Card Acceptor Names

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip before starting to collect the result set

params.name: sort_direction
params.description: Direction to sort the data using sort_field in response

params.name: sort_field
params.description: Field to Sort data in response

params.name: search_text
params.description:
Input field used as wild search against Card Acceptor. 
The service searches for substring, following the %search_text% pattern.

items.docs: Returns Card Acceptor Names with pagination metadata

info.name: Mastercard Add Card Acceptor Names

items.docs: Creates card acceptor names under a location of an existing sub-merchant

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier of the card acceptor name.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier of the card acceptor name.

items.docs: Updates card acceptor name object

info.name: Mastercard Delete Existing Card Acceptor Name

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier of the card acceptor name.

items.docs: Returns 204 status code if Card Acceptor Name deleted successfully

info.name: Acquirer  Merchant  I Ds
Mastercard Get Accepted Acquirer Reference Id and Card Acceptor Id Pairs

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip before starting to collect the result set

params.name: sort_direction
params.description: Direction to sort the data using sort_field in response

params.name: sort_field
params.description: Field to Sort data in response

params.name: search_text
params.description:
Input field used as wild search against Acquirer Reference ID and Card Acceptor
ID. The service searches for substring, following the %search_text% pattern.

items.docs: Returns accepted Acquirer Reference ID and CardAcceptor ID pairs with pagination metadata

info.name: Mastercard Add Acquirer Reference Id and Card Acceptor Id Pairs

items.docs: Returns added pairs of Acquirer Reference ID and Card Acceptor ID. Non unique pairs are placed in the rejected list.

info.name: Acquirer

params.description: Unique identifier of Acquirer Reference Id and Card Acceptor Id Pair
